jobs.company: Department of Health and Human Services
jobs.title: Toxicologist
jobs.description: Degree in toxicology/pharmacology/related science or American Board of Toxicology certification; 1–6 years of relevant toxicology experience depending on degree; transcripts required.

jobs.title: Principal Toxicologist
jobs.description: Advanced degree (MS or PhD) in toxicology or related field, 6+ years industry experience in medical devices, 8+ years toxicology/biocompatibility experience, ISO 10993 knowledge, regulated environment and audit support experience.

jobs.title: Senior Toxicologist
jobs.description: DABT required, 10+ years toxicology experience with litigation support, strong technical writing and communication, experience evaluating laboratory and exposure data, and degree in toxicology or related field (or equivalent experience).

jobs.title: Principal Toxicologist
jobs.description: Advanced degree in toxicology, 6+ years industry medical device experience, 8–10 years toxicology/biocompatibility experience, GLP/regulatory familiarity, ISO 10993/13485/14971 knowledge, lab animal and material degradation experience.

jobs.title: Toxicologist R&D
jobs.description: Bachelor's in toxicology/pharmacology,5+ years toxicology experience in medical device or related industry,knowledge of ISO 10993/18562/14971,FDA/EU MDR,biocompatibility,chemical characterization;DABT preferred.

jobs.title: Dep Chief Toxicologist
jobs.location: Washington, District of Columbia, United States
jobs.description: Degree in toxicology or related biological/medical/veterinary science with substantial chemistry coursework; ABFT or ABCC certification preferred; valid driver’s license; supervisory and forensic laboratory experience; ability to perform strenuous physical tasks.

jobs.title: Toxicologist - Forensic Expert
jobs.description: Ph.D. in toxicology or related discipline, 5+ years toxicology experience, board certification preferred (ABFT or DABT), membership in toxicology organization, travel ~20% for initial training.

jobs.title: Principal Toxicologist
jobs.description: Advanced degree in toxicology or related field, 6+ years medical device industry experience, 8–10 years toxicology/biocompatibility experience, regulatory and ISO knowledge, GLP experience, strong communication and leadership skills.

jobs.title: Predictive Toxicologist
jobs.location: Research Triangle Park, North Carolina, United States
jobs.description: Scientific writing/editing experience, strong technical writing and organizational skills, ability to evaluate statistical data, familiarity with MS Word/Excel/PowerPoint, and willingness to learn R or Python; B.S. required, M.S. preferred; 1+ to 4+ years scientific writing/editing experience.

jobs.title: Principal Consulting Toxicologist
jobs.description: PhD in toxicology or related field, ~15+ years professional experience with consulting and leadership, testifying expert experience, deep toxicological risk assessment and regulatory expertise, strong business development and communication skills.

jobs.title: Senior Principal Toxicologist
jobs.description: PhD in toxicology required, 10+ years relevant experience; DART experience preferred; recognized toxicology authority; ability to lead risk assessments, apply statistical/data science tools, and travel up to 15%.

jobs.title: Principal Scientist, Toxicologist/Study Director
jobs.description: PhD or DVM with graduate/post-graduate training in toxicology or related field; 8+ years toxicology/study director experience; GLP knowledge; immunology/biologics expertise; strong communication and leadership skills.

jobs.title: Environmental Toxicologist (Biochemist) (76341)
jobs.description: Ph.D. with 5+ years (or MS with 8+ years, or BS with 10+ years) in toxicology or related life science; expertise in in vivo toxicology, GLP and regulatory guidelines (OECD, ICH); study leadership, project management, and strong communication; legal U.S. work authorization required.

jobs.title: Associate Director, Study Toxicologist
jobs.description: PhD in toxicology/pharmacology/DMPK,10+ years pharmaceutical/biotech nonclinical development experience, CRO study management, protocol/report review, strong communication and multitasking skills.

jobs.title: Toxicologist 9-P11/12 - Hazardous Waste Program
jobs.description: Master's in toxicology or related science with specified coursework; professional experience assessing toxic substances and conducting risk assessments; must provide transcripts and application materials.

jobs.title: Public Health Toxicologist (Ph.D.)
jobs.description: Ph.D. in toxicology/public health or related field, strong human health toxicology and risk assessment expertise, excellent writing and communication, ability to manage multiple projects and work independently or in teams; must be authorized to work in the U.S.

jobs.title: Senior Risk Assessor/Toxicologist
jobs.location: Houston or Austin or Irvine or San Francisco or Folsom or Olympia or Missoula or Helena or Lakewood or Raleigh or Syracuse
jobs.description: 8+ years human health risk assessment experience; Bachelor's in chemistry, toxicology, public health (Master's preferred); 40-hour OSHA HAZWOPER; project management, DTSC/RWQCB familiarity, valid driver's license, ability to travel.

jobs.title: Director, Toxicology
jobs.description: PhD/DVM-level toxicologist with ~10+ years' nonclinical safety experience, GLP knowledge, CRO management, and ability to prepare regulatory nonclinical sections.

jobs.title: Medical Toxicologist TDH Poison Center (Per Diem < 20 hours/week)
jobs.description: MD/DO required; active Texas medical license; board certified or board eligible in medical toxicology; provides remote toxicology consultation and clinical oversight for poison center.

jobs.title: Medical Toxicologist TDH Poison Center (Per Diem < 20 hours/week)
jobs.description: MD or DO required; active Texas medical license; board certified or board eligible in medical toxicology; provides remote toxicology consultation and clinical oversight.

jobs.title: Supervisory Biologist/Toxicologist/Physical Scientist/Chemist

jobs.company: Brody School of Medicine at East Carolina University

jobs.description: Board-certified or eligible in Emergency Medicine and Medical Toxicology; active clinical practice in EM/toxicology; demonstrated education and research contributions; fellowship-trained candidates encouraged.

jobs.title: Environmental Scientist

jobs.title: Environmental Scientist

jobs.title: Environmental Scientist

jobs.title: Environmental Scientist
jobs.description: 5+ years environmental experience, bachelor’s or master’s in related field, wetland/species permitting knowledge, ArcGIS familiarity, technical writing, ecological field work, client coordination, and travel flexibility.

jobs.title: Environmental Scientist

jobs.title: Environmental Scientist
jobs.description: Bachelor's or master's in environmental science or related field (or equivalent experience), minimum 1 year experience with wetland/stream delineations, field and reporting skills, permitting knowledge, ability to travel for field work.

jobs.title: Environmental Scientist
jobs.description: Bachelor's or Master's in relevant field, 5+ years managing environmental projects in Indiana, NEPA and permitting experience, GIS/ArcGIS and CAD proficiency, client development and project management skills; relevant certifications desirable.

jobs.title: Environmental Scientist

jobs.title: Environmental Scientist

jobs.title: Environmental Scientist
